sections.title: Emergency Response Plan Acknowledgment
sections.html:
This policy outlines the procedures for emergency response, ensuring employee safety and compliance with regulatory requirements. It covers actions to be taken during various emergency situations, including evacuation, shelter-in-place, and communication protocols. Adherence to this plan is crucial for minimizing risks and protecting personnel and assets.

I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction Emergency Response Plan Policy as required by 29 CFR 1926.35 Employee Emergency Action Plans and WAC 296-155-140 Sanitation Emergency provisions.

Employee Acknowledgment Signatures
